raw_consumer_statement: XXXX renewed annual subscription on XX/XX/year> ... service has not worked since. Numerous reports on XXXX and XXXX confirm the site no longer works. XXXX just announced they will be shutting down at the end of the year. XXXXXXXX XXXX  response was my IP address, showing we attempted to use the service at some point, but did not provide dates ( note that it did work for the year prior to the renewal so... yea ). XXXX  does not respond to support requests.
